meta.title: Resources - CaltransBizConnect
meta.description: Access templates, guides, and resources for Small Businesses and prime contractors using CaltransBizConnect.

fields.title: Resources & Tools
fields.subtitle: Templates, guides, and resources to help you succeed

cards.title: Capability Statement Guide
cards.body: Step-by-step guide to building a compelling capability statement that gets noticed by agencies.

cards.title: Small Business Eligibility Checklist
cards.body: Review all eligibility requirements for Small Business certification with Caltrans.

cards.title: Bid Readiness Toolkit
cards.body: Templates, checklists, and guides designed to prepare your business for the bidding process.

cards.title: Opportunity Posting Guidelines
cards.body: Best practices for creating clear, complete opportunity postings that attract qualified small businesses.

cards.title: Small Business Evaluation Checklist
cards.body: Use this checklist to evaluate small business qualifications and capability statements.

cards.title: Small Business Program Overview
cards.body: Learn about the Small Business program goals, requirements, and benefits.

cards.title: Caltrans District Map
cards.body: View the map of all 12 Caltrans districts and their coverage areas.

fields.heading: Need Additional Support?
fields.text: Our team offers training sessions, workshops, and one-on-one consultations to help you succeed.
